update_description:
✨ New Features
- In-App Updates: Easier way to keep your app up to date with the latest features 🔄
General bug fixes and stability improvements for a seamless experience 🛠️
Mussifly Player V2 Swipe: Swipe thumbnails to change songs (swipe left for next, right for previous) 👉
Premium Swipe Animations: Smooth rotation and scaling effects for an immersive experience 🎞️
Smarter Data Sync: Your library now syncs faster and uses much less internet ⚡
Fixed Autoplay: No more random pauses when opening the app ▶️
Snappier Profiles: Your profile and stats now load faster with better caching 🚀
Improved Navigation: Fine-tuned the bottom bar for a smoother, premium feel 🧭
Better Background Sync: Your songs and playlists stay updated automatically 🔁
Reliable Bulk Likes: Syncing large number of liked songs is now more robust ❤️
